title: template.config.json
description: Per-project config for a Runflow Templates entry under projects/<name>/.

type.description: Build type. Usually auto-detected; required for custom and node-functions.

title.description: Human-readable title shown on the landing card.

noindex.description: Opt this template out of indexing (adds a robots meta + drops it from sitemap.xml).

outputDir.description: For custom: directory (relative to the project) the build writes to. Default: dist.

section.description: Group this project's demos under a named section on the landing page.

demos.description: Sub-entries rendered as individual cards under `section`.

dashboard.description: node-functions: the static dashboard built alongside the functions.

dir.description: Project-relative dir to build from. Default: '.'

buildCmd.description: Command to build the dashboard. Default: 'npm run build'.

outputDir.description: Built output dir copied to dist/<name>/.

functions.description: node-functions: serverless functions bundled with esbuild.

perEntry.description: Per-entry overrides keyed by the entry path.

crons.description: node-functions: cron schedules. `path` is project-relative; the hub prepends /<name>.
